name: Chinese Chicken...fournier
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the garlic, ground ginger, five spice powder, soy sauce, white wine, and vegetable oil.
2. Place the chicken wings in a shallow dish or resealable plastic bag and pour the marinade over the chicken, ensuring all pieces are well coated. Marinate for at least 1 hour, or longer if possible.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Bake the marinated chicken wings for 30-40 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and crispy.
5. Alternatively, grill the chicken wings over medium heat, brushing them with the marinade every few minutes to crispen the skin. Cook until all pieces are golden brown and fully cooked through.
